mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (receiver_mid, sender_mid, noti_type, ref_id, message) VALUES (#{receiverMid}, #{senderMid}, #{notiType}, #{refId}, #{message})
mapper.select: SELECT noti_id, receiver_mid, sender_mid, noti_type, ref_id, message, is_read, reg_date FROM notification WHERE receiver_mid = #{receiverMid} ORDER BY reg_date DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE receiver_mid = #{receiverMid} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE receiver_mid = #{receiverMid} AND is_read = 0
